parameters.description: Send notifications to your own HomeAssistant destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise hassios:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native HomeAssistant persistent_notification payload delivered straight to your HA instance.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"message":{* _escape_json((_body.body or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "" or "")) *},"title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your HomeAssistant persistent_notification API (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment HomeAssistant destinations, direct

accesstoken_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's HomeAssistant accesstoken

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's HomeAssistant host
